variants.title: HiFi Filter SD 40788 Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 552
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SD 40788 Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 552
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SD 40788 Urea Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAB 552. Easy to install and replace, the SD 40788 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: UREA FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 41.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 16.5 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 12.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 47.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 40.0 mm
